title: stipa divaricata
intro: Stipa divaricata, also known as the spreading needle grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stipa divaricata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or a tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a herbal remedy.
